greetings.text: Thanks again for bringing back my Horadric Malus! I can imbue one normal item with magic now, whenever you're ready.
Good day to ya! I'm Charsi, the blacksmith here. Need anything repaired or want to trade?

services.response: Sure thing. A few taps of the hammer and it'll be good as new.
I got weapons, armor, bolts and arrows. All good quality, camp-made.
Alright! Hand me a plain item and I'll make it magical with the Horadric Malus. This is a one-time thing, so choose wisely!

questBranches.text: I had an enchanted smithing hammer — the Horadric Malus. But the monastery fell and it's still in there somewhere, in the Barracks I think. If you could bring it back, I could do so much more for the camp.
Find my Malus in the Barracks of the monastery. It's a special hammer — you'll know it when you see it.
You found it! My Malus! Oh, thank you! As thanks, I can imbue one normal item with powerful magic for you. Just say the word.
